nasb.text: He left Zadok the priest and his relatives the priests before the tabernacle of the Lord in the high place which was at Gibeon,

esv.text: And he left Zadok the priest and his brothers the priests before the tabernacle of the Lord  in the high place that was at Gibeon

cnv.text: 又留下撒督祭司和他的親族，都是作祭司的。在基遍的高地耶和華的帳幕前，

ccb.text: 并派祭司撒督及其他祭司在基遍高地的耶和华的圣幕前供职，
